title: Storn Cook
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Cook}}
'''Storn Cook''' is an artist who illustrated many [[West End Games]] sourcebooks.

==Contributions==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Storn Cook}}
*''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''
*''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]''

*[[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']]
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]
*''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''
*''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''
*''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''
*''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
*''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''
*''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
*''[[The Black Sphere]]''
*''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''
*''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''
*''[[The Kathol Outback]]''
*''[[The Kathol Rift]]''
